prompt_text:
# Flying Posters

OGL 3D vertical scroll gallery where image planes fly toward the viewer with a rubber-band distortion effect, creating a cinematic poster-reel experience.

## Use when
- Showcasing a portfolio or product images in a cinematic 3D scroll gallery.
- Adding a scroll-driven depth effect to a visual section.
- Creating an interactive gallery that responds to scroll speed.

## Stack
- Framework: react
- Libraries: ogl

## Install
```bash
npm install ogl
```

## Component — flying-posters.tsx
```tsx
// Source: animations_018.md
// Export: FlyingPosters (default)
// Props: images (string[]), className
// Uses OGL Renderer, Camera, Transform, Plane, Program, Mesh, Vec2
// Scroll velocity drives rubber-band plane distortion via shader uniform
// See full source in raw/animations_018.md
```

## Notes
- Requires OGL (~100 KB). Lazy-load for performance.
- Image URLs are passed as a prop; ensure CORS is allowed for cross-origin images.
